evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE gate outcome decisions — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+
methodology: Deterministic rule-based explainability. Each gate outcome is produced by explicit, enumerable decision rules — not opaque model inference. All decision paths are documented in the gate specification.

explanation_coverage.gate_outcome_derivation: Every PASS/SCOPE_LIMITED/FAIL_CLOSED outcome is traceable to a specific rule in the gate verifier
explanation_coverage.artifact_assurance_path: artifact_verified=true/false is computed from SHA256 hash comparison — fully reproducible
explanation_coverage.claim_boundary_derivation: claim_level_ceiling is deterministically derived from gate_outcome value

scope_of_application: All 12 AI-ME gates in AEM-EVOLVE v3.1 scaffold
known_limitations: Explainability covers governance layer only — not the underlying LLM advisory adapter
LLM advisory adapter outputs are excluded from governance path by design
No SHAP/LIME/attention analysis — not applicable to rule-based system
